'#. 811!2010-~(m-l)J ~. 31R. «1t11'11, ~ ~ kwun :-T{ff 3Tf~ ~ <fiT.31T.1027(aT), ~ 12 "It, 2011 q)f ~ 'qJ'{(f ct~, 3lm~, 'WT II. m 3, '3'I-m (i i) -q SfCf) lfitl (1 'S3TT tit I 4019 GI/2011 (I) -- 1 of 2 -- --7""------ . __ ._. . . ._. _ THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY MINISTRY OF MINORITY AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION __.'! ..~;\-;~_ "_•• [PmIT SOC.3(j;)]~~ New Delhi, the 24th October, 2011 S.O. 2476(E).-:-In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sectio~s (1) and (2) of Section 9 of the Wakf Act, 1995 (43 of 1995), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification of the Ministry of Minority Affairs number S.O. 1027(E), published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, dated the 12th May, 2011, namely:- In the said notification,- (iY under the heading "Members appointed,under sub-clause (iv) of clause (b) of sub-section (2) of / Section 9", after serial number 2, the following serial number and entries shall be inserted, namely :_ "3. Shri LiyakatAli Khan, IPS (Retd.), Chairperson, Rajasthan Board of Muslim Wakf, L. K. 1, La! Kothi Yojna, Jyoti Nagar, Jaipur, Rajasthan"; under the heading "Members appointed under sub-clause (v) of clause (b) of sub-section (2) of Section 9", after serial number 1, the following serial number and entries shall be inserted, namely :_ "2. Justice (Retd.) Bilal Nazki, Retired ChiefJustice of Orissa High Court, B-98, 1st Floor, Sector-23, Noida, Uttar Pradesh"; 2. The above members will hold office from the date of assumption of office till 1I th May, 20 16. [F. No. 8/1120 1O-Wakf (Vol. I)] E. R. SOLOMON, Jt. Secy. Note :-The principal notification number S.O. 1027(E), dated the 12th May, 2011 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, sub-section (ii).
